kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST
kw.msg: POST Request : url=https://serverest.dev/usuarios path_url=/usuarios headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.34.2', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '100', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"nome": "Alexandre", "email": "portugal50@gmail.com", "password": "teste", "administrador": "true"}'

kw.name: Status Should Be
kw.doc: Fails if response status code is different than the expected.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST
kw.msg: POST Request : url=https://serverest.dev/usuarios path_url=/usuarios headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.34.2', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '100', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"nome": "Alexandre", "email": "portugal50@gmail.com", "password": "teste", "administrador": "true"}'

kw.name: Dictionary Should Contain Value
kw.arg: Este email já está sendo usado
kw.doc: Fails if ``value`` is not found from ``dictionary``.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: GET
kw.msg: GET Request : url=https://serverest.dev/usuarios/0uxuPY0cbmQhpEz1 path_url=/usuarios/0uxuPY0cbmQhpEz1 headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.34.2', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '127', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"nome": "Alexandre", "email": "portugal50@gmail.com", "password": "teste", "administrador": "true", "_id": "0uxuPY0cbmQhpEz1"}'

GET Response : url=https://serverest.dev/usuarios/0uxuPY0cbmQhpEz1 status=400, reason=Bad Request headers={'Content-Type': 'text/html; charset=UTF-8', 'Referrer-Policy': 'no-referrer', 'Content-Length': '1555', 'Date': 'Mon, 08 Jun 2026 11:44:51 GMT', 'X-Google-GFE-Backend-Request-Cost': '51.348645163658659', 'X-Google-GFE-Load-Report': 'utilization_percent: 51.348644 queries_per_second: 14404 errors_per_second: 0'} body= Error 400 (Bad Request)!!1

400. That’s an error.

Your client has issued a malformed or illegal request. That’s all we know.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST
kw.msg: POST Request : url=https://serverest.dev/usuarios path_url=/usuarios headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.34.2', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '110', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"nome": "Alexandre", "email": "alexandre.carinola50@gmail.com", "password": "teste", "administrador": "true"}'

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Strings
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to strings.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.
